description: Style NoteStylish to the T. These vintage- inspired handbags from fossil come with a stylish upper and spacious inner. Crafted from imperial leather, these handbags double up as an accessory speaking volumes about your personality.Product DetailsRed handbag with one main zipped compartment with organizer sleeves and a zipped pocketTwo short handles with a key and heart shaped keyhole design for styleKeyhole design applique's for added styleBranded bronze zippersBranding on the front keyholeBronze legs at base Material and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 26 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 11 cm
